operational_scenes.scene_title: Introduction to System Faults and Monitoring
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain system faults and their categorization
operational_intents: Describe system faults and AGV system faults
Explain how faults are detected and displayed
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract fault definitions and detection methods
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarifies fault types and monitoring approach

operational_scenes.scene_title: Accessing and Viewing System Faults Remotely
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss methods for remotely accessing system fault information
operational_intents: Explain limitations of thin clients and screen sharing
Describe use of APIs and databases for fault data retrieval
Outline typical support call scenarios and screen sharing capabilities
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract remote access methods and support procedures
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Details remote fault monitoring and support workflows

operational_scenes.scene_title: Data Sources and API Integration for Fault Monitoring
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain data sources and API use for fault data access
operational_intents: Clarify data feeding from APIs and databases
Discuss call center access and transition away from call-based support
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract data integration and support access details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Highlights data flow and evolving support methods

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Status and Hop In Functionality Overview
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe AGV status pop-up and hop in controls
operational_intents: Explain hop in, close out, and hop in disabled states
Detail effects of hop in on totes and shoots
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract AGV status and hop in operational details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focuses on AGV control features and status monitoring
